title: TIMING BELT - Installation (Cont'd)

figures_detected.description: Timing belt sprocket area showing sprocket bolt slots and removal arrows
Flywheel area showing flywheel locking pin SST KV109B0112 installation point
Camshaft and injection pump sprocket area showing locking pin installation arrows
Timing belt area showing loosening of camshaft and injection pump sprocket bolts and tensioner nut
Timing belt area showing SST KV109B0030 installed on belt edge and KV109B0080 tensioner tool

steps.text: Remove one bolt from each sprocket to make certain that they are not at the end of their slots.
Re-install the sprocket bolts and tighten the bolts to the specified torque while holding the sprockets from rotating with SST KV109B0070.
Remove all locking pins and rotate crankshaft two revolutions clockwise.
Re-install flywheel locking pin SST KV109B0112.
Re-install camshaft and injection pump locking pins SST KV109B0111 and KV109B0110.
Loosen the camshaft and injection pump sprocket bolts slightly and loosen tensioner nut.
Install SST KV109B0030 on the edge of the belt. Take care not to obstruct any other component.
Rotate tensioner counter-clockwise to obtain a reading of: 54 SEEM units for a new belt; 44 SEEM units for a used belt. Tighten tensioner nut to the specified torque. Remove SST KV109B0030.

tools_referenced.name: Flywheel locking pin
tools_referenced.usage: Lock flywheel during timing belt tensioning

tools_referenced.name: Camshaft locking pin
tools_referenced.usage: Lock camshaft during timing belt tensioning

tools_referenced.name: Injection pump locking pin
tools_referenced.usage: Lock injection pump during timing belt tensioning

tools_referenced.name: Sprocket holding tool
tools_referenced.usage: Hold sprockets from rotating while tightening sprocket bolts

tools_referenced.name: Belt tension measuring tool (SEEM gauge adapter)
tools_referenced.usage: Installed on edge of timing belt to measure tension

tools_referenced.name: Tensioner counter-clockwise rotation tool
tools_referenced.usage: Rotate tensioner counter-clockwise to set belt tension

model_notes: VJZ engine variant indicated by section code. Procedure references injection pump, indicating diesel engine application.
